backstory.original: Krull is a death-cleric of Tiamat who swore allegiance to Arkhan the Cruel after being bested by him in combat. He's Arkhan's alchemist, his experimenter, his torturer... Always surrounded by the dead, Krull wears a white painted face mask that makes him look undead in an effort to confuse and strike fear in his opponents.
backstory.display: 克鲁尔是提亚马特的死亡牧师。在战斗中被残暴者阿克汉击败后，他发誓效忠于阿克汉。他是阿克汉的炼金术士、实验品和拷问者......克鲁尔总是被死者所环绕，他戴着白色的面具，使其看起来像个亡灵，以迷惑对手并使其产生恐惧。

description.original: Krull attacks a random enemy with his Maul.
description.display: 克鲁尔用他的双手锤攻击一名随机敌人。

description.original: Krull summons four corrupted ghouls that rush towards the nearest enemies and explode.
description.display: 克鲁尔召唤四只腐化的食尸鬼，冲向距离最近的敌人并爆炸。

longDescription.original: Krull summons four corrupted ghouls that rush towards the nearest enemies and explode, damaging all nearby enemies and leaving behind pools of necrotic goo that last for 30 seconds.
longDescription.display: 克鲁尔召唤四只腐化的食尸鬼，冲向距离最近的敌人并爆炸，对附近的所有敌人造成伤害。同时留下一滩腐败粘液，持续 30 秒。

description.original: Krull greatly increases the damage of all evil champions, but by less if there are any do-gooders around.
description.display: 克鲁尔大幅提高所有邪恶阵营勇士的伤害，但如果他们周围有善良阵营的队友，则效果减弱。

description.desc: Every 5 seconds, Krull applies a draconic plague to the next enemy to spawn. The plagues gain a stack every 3 seconds, increasing their power and capping at 10 stacks. Plagues can also be applied by Krull's base attack.^$plague_description
每过 5 秒，克鲁尔对下一个即将刷新的敌人施放龙语瘟疫，巨龙瘟疫每 3 秒堆叠一层并提升威力，堆叠层数最多 10 层。克鲁尔的基本攻击也会附带瘟疫^$plague_description

tipText.original: Krull occasionally infects the next enemy to spawn with a Draconic Plague which can increase their damage taken, gold dropped, or make them trigger AOE damage.
tipText.display: 克鲁尔偶尔使下一个刷新的敌人感染龙语瘟疫，提高其受到的伤害、金币掉落，或使其触发范围伤害。

description.desc: When an enemy with a Draconic Plague dies there is a $(amount)% chance that its plague(s) will transfer to another enemy. It's possible for an enemy to gain multiple copies of the same plague when this occurs, which will stack multiplicatively.
当一名带有龙语瘟疫的敌人死亡时，有 $(amount) 几率将瘟疫转移到另一名敌人身上。这种情况下，同一名敌人有可能多次感染瘟疫（几率以乘算方式堆叠）

upgrades.effectReference: {"effect_string":"buff_upgrade,100,3210,2","description":"Increases the effect of Plague: Pain by 100%"}
{"effect_string":"buff_upgrade,100,3210,2","description":"Increases the effect of Plague: Pain by 100%"}

specializationDescription.original: Krull focuses his research on pilfering more gold from plagued foes.
specializationDescription.display: 克鲁尔的研究专注于从感染瘟疫的敌人身上窃取更多金币。

specializationDescription.original: Krull focuses his research on inflicting more pain on plagued foes.
specializationDescription.display: 克鲁尔的研究专注于使感染瘟疫的敌人受到更多伤害。

specializationDescription.original: Krull focuses his research on increasing the traitorous tendencies of plagued foes.
specializationDescription.display: 克鲁尔的研究专注于提高感染瘟疫敌人的背叛倾向。

description.desc: Krull increases the damage of all Evil Champions in the formation by $(amount)%, reduced by $(reduction)% for each Good Champion in the formation.
克鲁尔使阵型中所有邪恶阵营勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%，但阵型中的每位善良阵营勇士都会使加成降低 $(reduction)%

tipText.original: Krull increases the damage of all evil Champions, but reduces the bonus for each good Champion in the formation.
tipText.display: 克鲁尔使所有邪恶勇士的伤害提高，但阵型中的每位善良勇士都会使加成降低。

upgrades.effectReference: {"effect_string":"buff_upgrade,100,3210,2","description":"Increases the effect of Plague: Pain by 100%"}

description.desc: Krull increases the damage of Arkhan the Cruel by $(amount)%, reduced by $(reduce_by_slot)% (multiplicatively) for each slot away from Krull greater than one.
克鲁尔使残暴者阿克汉的伤害提高 $(amount)%。阿克汉与克鲁尔距离一格以上时，每增加一格则降低此加成 $(reduce_by_slot)%（乘算）

upgrades.effectReference: {"effect_string":"buff_upgrade,100,3210,1","description":"Increases the effect of Plague: Pilfer by 100%"}
{"effect_string":"buff_upgrade,200,3210,2","description":"Increases the effect of Plague: Pain by 200%"}

description.desc: Increase the effect of $(upgrade_name id) by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Dark Order member adjacent to $source.
每有一位黑暗教团成员与$source相邻，$(upgrade_name id)的效果即提升 $(not_buffed amount)%。

description.original: Inspiration comes from many sources, including fear.
description.display: 灵感的来源很多，包括恐惧。

description.original: My life may be forfeit, but I still need funds for my experiments.
description.display: 我的性命可能会被没收，但我还是需要资金来做实验。

description.original: What's that behind your ear? It's a blade. Keep your wits about you.
description.display: 你耳朵后面是什么？是把利刃，保持冷静。

description.original: Treat others as if you could turn them into gold. Then do so.
description.display: 对待他人，要像你能把他们变成金子一样。然后再这样做。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Plague: Pilfer by $(amount)%
Increases the effect of Plague: Pilfer by $(amount)%

description.original: Strike at the raised bits and watch them crumble.
description.display: 敲打升起的部分，然后看着它们粉碎。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Plague: Pain by $(amount)%

description.original: They can't retaliate if they can't move!
description.display: 如果他们动不了，就没办法报复了！

effects.description: Increases the effect of Plague: Pain by $(amount)%

description.display: 友情将成为他们失败的原因。

effects.description: Increases the chance of Virulent Strain triggering by $(amount)%

description.original: Unicorn horns were the key all along.
description.display: 独角兽的角一直都是关键。

effects.description: Increases the chance of Virulent Strain triggering by $(amount)%

description.original: I must help my master control the Hand of Vecna.
description.display: 我必须帮我的主人控制维克那之手。

description.original: Strike while the iron is hot. The burning helps.
description.display: 做事该趁热打铁。燃烧般的痛感会起到作用。

description.original: Why fight over this silly metal when you can create it!
description.display: 既然你能创造出这种愚蠢的东西，为什么还要为它争斗呢！

effects.description: Increases the effect of Plague: Pilfer by $(amount)%

description.original: Arkhan bested me, so he has my service. For now.
description.display: 阿克汉打败了我，所以他得到了我的效忠。暂时而已。

character_sheet_details.backstory: Krull is a death-cleric of Tiamat who swore allegiance to Arkhan the Cruel after being bested by him in combat. He's Arkhan's alchemist, his experimenter, his torturer... Always surrounded by the dead, Krull wears a white painted face mask that makes him look undead in an effort to confuse and strike fear in his opponents.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Krulls applies plagues to monsters as they spawn, debuffing them in ways that are supremely beneficial to your party.

event_upgrades.name: Arkhan's Army
event_upgrades.description: Krull greatly increases the damage of all evil champions, but by less if there are any do-gooders around.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 克鲁尔是提亚马特的死亡牧师。在战斗中被残暴者阿克汉击败后，他发誓效忠于阿克汉。他是阿克汉的炼金术士、实验品和拷问者......克鲁尔总是被死者所环绕，他戴着白色的面具，使其看起来像个亡灵，以迷惑对手并使其产生恐惧。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 克鲁尔在怪物刷新时对它们施加瘟疫，以有利于队伍的方式对怪物进行减益。

event_upgrades.name: 阿克汉的军队
event_upgrades.description: 克鲁尔大幅提高所有邪恶阵营勇士的伤害，但如果他们周围有善良阵营的队友，则效果减弱。

display.description: 克鲁尔召唤四只腐化的食尸鬼，冲向距离最近的敌人并爆炸。
display.long_description: 克鲁尔召唤四只腐化的食尸鬼，冲向距离最近的敌人并爆炸，对附近的所有敌人造成伤害。同时留下一滩腐败粘液，持续 30 秒。

original.tip_text: Krull occasionally infects the next enemy to spawn with a Draconic Plague which can increase their damage taken, gold dropped, or make them trigger AOE damage.
